<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Memorial Spray](19-memorial-spray.jpg)

Sized for the casket lid (single 60 cm or double 90 cm). White roses and lilies, with cool greenery — eucalyptus, ruscus, ferns. Includes a slot for a card or sash if you'd like one.

## What's in it

- White lilies and roses
- Eucalyptus, ruscus and Boston fern
- Optional sash with the family's chosen text

## Care

Built day-of, taken to the chapel the morning of the service.
